name: Nelly Furtado
bio: Nelly Furtado's catalog still earns because mid-2000s crossover pop remains highly reusable on streaming, playlists, and short-form platforms.
notable_for: Mid-2000s crossover singles with strong replay value.
career_highlight: Loose remains one of the more durable mainstream pop catalogs of its era.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Nelly Furtado's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Nelly Furtado's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
